themeCSS: .node rect, .node polygon, .node circle, .node ellipse { rx: 12px !important; ry: 12px !important; stroke-width: 2.5px !important; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)) !important; } .cluster rect { rx: 16px !important; ry: 16px !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; stroke-dasharray: none !important; } .flowchart-link, .edgePath path { stroke-width: 2px !important; } .edgeLabel { font-size: 14px !important; background-color: #ffffff !important; padding: 4px 8px !important; border-radius: 6px !important; } .label { font-weight: 500 !important; } .cluster .nodeLabel { font-weight: 600 !important; font-size: 16px !important; }
